zh.Mitford Castle Morpeth Northumberland En: 英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德卡素 莫普斯
zh.lifeSummary: Sir John I Mitford是Lord John de Mitford I的兒子，於1026年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德卡素 莫普斯。他和Baroness Barbara de Lawson至少有1個女兒。他去世於1108年在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德米特福德享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir John I Mitford是Lord John de Mitford I的儿子，于1026年出生在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德卡素 莫普斯。他和Baroness Barbara de Lawson至少有1个女儿。他去世于1108年在英国英格兰諾圖波藍德米特福德享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mitford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Medford
meanings: English: variant of Mitford, a habitational name from Mitford (Northumberland). The placename probably derives from Old English midd ‘middle’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: Sir John I Mitford was born in 1026, in Castle Morpeth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom as the son of Lord John de Mitford I. He had at least 1 daughter with Baroness Barbara de Lawson. He died in 1108, in Mitford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir John I Mitford est né en 1026, à Castle Morpeth, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fils de Lord John de Mitford I. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Baroness Barbara de Lawson. Il est décédé en 1108, à Mitford, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.Mitford Castle Morpeth Northumberland En: Castle Morpeth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Sir John I Mitford wurde 1026 in Castle Morpeth, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, als Sohn von Lord John de Mitford I geboren. Er hatte mit Baroness Barbara de Lawson mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb 1108 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Mitford, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Sir John I Mitford è nato il nel 1026 nel Castle Morpeth, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlio di Lord John de Mitford I. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Baroness Barbara de Lawson. Morì nel 1108, nel Mitford, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.Mitford, Northumberland, England: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォード
ja.Mitford Castle, Morpeth, Northumberland,: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォード
ja.Mitford Castle Morpeth Northumberland En: イギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドカストル モーペス
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John I Mitfordは1026年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドカストル モーペスでLord John de Mitford Iの息子として生まれた。彼はBaroness Barbara de Lawsonとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1108年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォードで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John I Mitford(은)는 1026년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 카스틀 모르페스에서 Lord John de Mitford I의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 Baroness Barbara de Lawson(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1108년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 미트퍼드에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir John I Mitford nasceu em 1026, em Castle Morpeth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filho de Lord John de Mitford I. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Baroness Barbara de Lawson. Ele faleceu em 1108, em Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir John I Mitford родился в 1026 г. в местности кастл морпет, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания. Его отца звали Lord John de Mitford I. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Baroness Barbara de Lawson. Он умер в 1108 г. в местности митфорд, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.
